title: Variable Rate Repo (VRR) auctions under LAF for the end of the Financial Year
description: On a review of current and evolving liquidity conditions, and to provide flexibility to the banking system in year-end liquidity management, it has been decided to conduct the following Variable Rate Repo (VRR) auctions: Sl. No. Date of Auction Notified Amount (₹ crore) Tenor (day) Window Timing Date of Reversal 1 March 27, 2026 (Friday) 75,000 6 9:30 AM to 10:00 AM April 02, 2026 (Thursday) 2 March 30, 2026 (Monday) 50,000 3 9:30 AM to 10:00 AM April 02, 2026 (Thursday) 2.
